Off Calendar Mar-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Jonathan Bernstein, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff William Gunderman who was sworn and examined. The Court hears evidence and grants judgment as prayed for in the petition. Judgment signed.
